characters.name: Andie
characters.description: AndieGeneralGenderFemaleAge18 (Season 6)Resides inSan Fransisco, CaliforniaOccupationTurtle RacingStudent (senior)AppearanceEye colorBrownHair colorBrownRelationshipsFriendsZoraBooker BaxterNeil FloresIvy ChenVictor BaxterEnemiesAlice BaxterAffiliationsUnderground Turtle Racing PromotionProductionSeason (s)6First EpisodeWorking for The WeekndLatest EpisodeCuda I Have This Dance?Portrayed byChloe BerlingerAndiewas a teen resident of San Francisco and was affiliated with an underground turtle racing promotion. Andie and Neil apparently have developed a highly competitive rivalry concerning their racing turtle, with Andie consistently being the victor. Neil reluctantly reruns their acquaintance, when Andie offers the tickets for The Weeknd concert up as a possible winning Prize.She is played byChloe Berlinger

Go's(formerly)AffiliationsThe Chi-LectiveRadio E-ClipsProductionSeason (s)1,2,3,4,5,6First EpisodeBaxter's Back!Portrayed byIssac Ryan BrownBooker Baxter-Carteris a lead character on theDisney Channelseries,Raven's Home. He is the son ofRaven Baxterand her ex-husband,Devon Carter, as well as the younger twin brother ofNia Baxter-Carter. He is portrayed byIssac Ryan Brown. Booker is overly confident, but lovable and has a knack for getting in trouble because of his newly foundpsychic powers. Sometimes, he's a chronic liar, constantly telling tall tales to make himself look good. He's sometimes dim-witted. Booker is somewhat lazy and clumsy. That makes Raven want to pay more attention to him than Nia. Despite his tendency to get into trouble, Booker is caring and supportive. Whenever he sees something bad about to happen to someone he cares about, he goes above and beyond to protect them.

characters.name: Camp Kikiwaka Campers
characters.actor_name: Miranda MayIsrael JohnsonShelby SimmonsRaphael AlejandroWill Buie Jr.Mallory James MahoneyScarlett Estevez
characters.description: Camp Kikiwaka CampersTypeCampersMembersLou HockhauserNoah LambertAva KingMatteo SilvaFinn SawyerDestiny BakerGwen FloresResides inMoose Rump, MaineRivalsCamp ChampionProductionPortrayed ByMiranda MayIsrael JohnsonShelby SimmonsRaphael AlejandroWill Buie Jr.Mallory James MahoneyScarlett EstevezAppeared InRaven About Bunk'd The paths of theCamp Kikiwaka Campersand those of the Baxter-Carter-Grayson Fam, began to converge whenRaven Baxteroffered a no expense trip to their neighborTess O'Malley, to her week-long basketball program at Camp Champion, when her initial travel plans  with her dad fell apart.  AtNia's suggestion, the original simple drop off Scüt ride to Maine, was expanded into a full family vacation.  However,BookerandLeviinsist on the condition that Raven not pick up any additional  Scüt passengers during the journey.  Exchanging a quick glance withChelsea, Raven amends her offer to a some expense trip instead.    After a twenty hour drive, the rest of the group had fallen asleep, but a tiring Raven doggedly turned into the first camp sign she saw, before succumbing to slumber herself.  However, she had fallen short of the Camp Champion destination, actually arriving across the lake at their oldest rival, Camp Kikiwaka.  The protagonists of their own Disney Channel Original Series,Bunk'd,the campers are listed here in the order they were encountered by the various members of the Fam.

characters.name: Chris Spring-Lake
characters.description: Chris Spring-LakeGeneralFull nameChris Spring-LakeGenderMaleResides inHollywood, CaliforniaChicago, IllinoisOccupationTV HostEntrepreneurSingerCelebrity InfluencerTV ProducerAppearanceEye colorBrownHair colorBlackRelationshipsFamilyChet Spring-Lake (brother)Buzz (first Cousin)RomancesRaven Baxter(Crush)AffiliationsRadio Eclipse LiveSpring-2-GOFresher Than That (former band member)ProductionSeason (s)3First EpisodeCali DreamsLatest EpisodeLevel UpPortrayed byJaleel WhiteChris Spring-Lakeis a recurring character onRaven's Home.He first encounters the Baxters throughThe Chi-Lective'sentry into the Radio Eclipse Live Contest. Later, he relocates to Chicago and gradually assumes a more prominent place in the lives of the Baxters and their friends. He is portrayed byJaleel White. Chris grew up famous and is thus loathe to ever give it up. Money is his constant companion, and he is always considering ways on how to profit from any situation he finds himself in. characters.description: Coach SpitzGeneralGenderMaleResides inChicagoOccupationP.E. TeacherFootball CoachBasketball CoachAspiring PlaywrightSchoolGeorge Washington Carver Community SchoolAppearanceEye colorBrownHair colorBlackRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed motherProductionSeason (s)1,2,3First EpisodeYou're Gonna Get ItLatest EpisodeHoop StreamsPortrayed byAnthony AlabiCoach Spitzwas a recurring character onRaven's Home. He began as a substitute gym teacher and ultimately becomes the Head Coach of both the Football and Basketball Teams ofGeorge Washington Carver Community School. He was portrayed byAnthony Alabi. Coach Spitz is energetic as seen in how much energy and enthusiasm he puts into his P.E. lessons and during his investigation of the illicit snack ring. characters.name: Curtis
characters.description: CurtisGeneralGenderMaleAge12Resides inChicago, IllinoisOccupationStudentSchoolGeorge Washington Carver Community School(Graduated)AppearanceEye colorBrownHair colorBlackRelationshipsRomancesNia Baxter(person he wanted to dance with atBooker'sandNia'sbirthday party)FriendsThe GuntzBooker BaxterLevi GraysonMitch MoseleyProductionSeason (s)2,3First EpisodeThe Trouble With LeviLatest EpisodeOn EdgePortrayed byDonovan WhitfieldCurtisis a recurring character in theDisney Channelseries,Raven's Home.He is a student atGeorge Washington Carver Community School. He is the father ofBetty Jane Baxter, and thus the maternal grandfather ofAlice Baxter. He is portrayed byRaven-Symoné.

characters.name: Devon Carter
characters.description: Devon CarterRaven's HomeThat's So RavenGeneralFull nameDevon CarterNickname(s)Uncle Devon (Levi)D (Raven)GenderMaleDate of BirthMay 17, 1985Resides inChicago, Illinois (currently)Dallas, Texas (formerly)San Francisco, California (formerly)OccupationMeteorologistSchoolBayside High School(formerly)AppearanceEye colorBrownHair colorBlackRelationshipsFamilyRaven Baxter(crush in school later ex-wife)Nia Baxter(daughter)Booker Baxter(son)Nadine Carter (sister)Unnamed MotherUnnamed FatherShawndra (step-mother)RomancesRaven Baxter(ex-wife)Alana Rivera(crush on her side)FriendsLevi GraysonRaven BaxterChelsea GraysonTess O'MalleyEddie ThomasVictor BaxterGarrett GraysonCal JohnsonEnemiesAlana RiveraAffiliationsKYBT Channel 7Action News 182 (Dallas)ProductionSeason (s)1,2,3,4First EpisodeBig Trouble in Little ApartmentLatest EpisodeSo You Think You Can DrivePortrayed byJonathan McDaniel Devon Carteris a recurring character inRaven's Home,the ex-husband ofRaven Baxterand the father of her twins,NiaandBooker. He had previously appeared in several episodes ofThat's So Raven, as Raven's high school boyfriend. He is portrayed byJonathan McDaniel. Devon has always had an extremely kind nature and tends to see the best in people. He dislikes confrontations and tends to avoid them. Although their marriage did not last, they remain on friendly terms, however, Raven does tend to subtly denigrate Devon to their twins by implying that their flaws stem from him rather than her.

characters.name: Dr. Lin Chen
characters.description: Dr. Lin ChenGeneralFull nameDr. Lin ChenGenderFemaleResides inSan Francisco, CaliforniaOccupationPodiatristAspiring PoliticianAppearanceEye colorBrownHair colorBlackRelationshipsFamilyIvy Chen(daughter)RomancesMr. Chen (husband)FriendsVictor BaxterNeil FloresRaven BaxterMariana FloresAffiliationsPodiatry ClinicProductionSeason (s)5,6First EpisodeTying the Astro-KnotLatest EpisodeSneaks and GeeksPortrayed byAnn HuDr. Lin Chenis the mother ofIvy Chen. She is a resident of San Francisco, a podiatrist that runs her own clinic, as well asVictor Baxter's backyard neighbor. She is currently running for a position on the San Francisco City Council.She is portrayed byAnn Hu.

characters.name: Dr. Sleevemore
characters.description: Dr. SleevemoreRaven's HomeThat's So RavenGeneralNickname(s)Dr. Sleeve (by students)GenderMaleResides inChicagoOccupationScientistDoctorAppearanceEye colorBrownHair colorWhiteRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed SonJasmine Sleevemore(granddaughter)RomancesUnnamed WifeAffiliationsSleevemore Center For Psychically Gifted ChildrenProductionSeason (s)2First EpisodeSleevemore Part One: FrozenLatest EpisodeSleevemore Part Three: FuturePortrayed byBrian GeorgeChicago Branch of Sleevemore Center For Psychically Gifted Children Dr. SleevemorewasRaven's old friend and mentor. Twice, while living as a teen in San Francisco, she turned to him when she had problems with her psychic powers. WhenBookeralso develops difficulty with his visions, Raven will once again turn to Dr. Sleevemore for help. He was portrayed byBrian George. Born with both clairvoyant and telekinetic abilities, Dr. Sleevemore naturally chose to study the fields of psychic phenomena, both to learn how to control his abilities and help others with extraordinary psychic gifts. He established a center in San Francisco devoted to such endeavors. A genius-class intellect, he also built and designed many inventions to further such research. Dr. Sleevemore seems quite proud that his granddaughter, Jasmine Sleevemore, has decided to follow in his footsteps, being already an accomplished scientist despite her young age, and being a capable colleague in their work at the Sleevemore Center.

characters.name: Garrett Grayson
characters.description: Garrett GraysonGeneralFull nameGarrett GraysonNickname(s)"Slothy the Slowman" (by Chelsea)GenderMaleResides inLondonAppearanceEye colorBrownHair colorLight brownRelationshipsFamilyLevi Grayson(Son)RomancesChelsea Grayson(ex-wife)FriendsDevon CarterEnemiesRaven BaxterFrenemiesChelsea Grayson(Possibly)ProductionSeason (s)3,4First EpisodeDisorder in the CourtLatest EpisodeAmerican Torah StoryPortrayed byJohnno WilsonGarrett Graysonis the ex-husband ofChelsea Graysonand the father ofLevi Grayson. His first appearance is inDisorder in the Court. He is played byJohnno Wilson. He was first mentioned inBaxter's Back!as Chelsea states, Chelsea and he parted ways in a friendly divorce. Chelsea had married Garrett and got one child,Levi. But then Garrett later got arrested for financial fraud, leading to separation with Chelsea. To help support each other raise their kids, Chelsea has moved in to live in Raven's apartment.

characters.name: Grandma Zo
characters.description: Grandma ZoGrandma Zo"Judge Foodie"GeneralFull nameZophiaNickname(s)Grandma ZoGenderFemaleResides inNew York City, New YorkAppearanceEye colorBrownHair colorRedRelationshipsFamilyTess O'Malley(granddaughter)Mrs. O'Malley (daughter)Jimmy O'Malley(son-in-law)ProductionSeason (s)3Appears inThe Story So-FaPortrayed byMindy SterlingZophia,better known as"Grandma Zo"isTess O'Malley's maternal grandmother. On her visit to352 Hauser AvenueTess andBookerattempt to try to slow her down after recovering from a fall. She was portrayed byMindy Sterling. Prior to her fall, Zophia was a more reserved individual. Extremely affectionate and kind to Tess as she grew up, they favored simple activities such as cookie baking, playing cards, and solving puzzles. However, after her fall, Zophia dramatically changed her outlook, adopting a more feisty personality. The new Grandma Zo has been described as a"firecracker." characters.name: Great Aunt Maureen
characters.description: Great Aunt MaureenGeneralNickname(s)Aunt MaureenGenderFemaleResides inChicagoAppearanceEye colorBrownHair colorBrown (wig)Black (natural)RelationshipsFamilyVivian (sister)Tanya Baxter (niece)Victor Baxter(nephew-in-law)Raven Baxter(grandniece)Nia Baxter(great grandniece)Booker Baxter-Carter(great-grandnephew)Cory Baxter (grandnephew)ProductionSeason (s)2Appears inSwitch-or-TreatPortrayed byDebbie AllenGreat Aunt Maureenwas a character inRaven's Home. She is the sister ofRaven'smaternal grandmother, Vivian, and thus is her grand-aunt. Like her sister, Maureen possesses psychic abilities comparable to Raven andBooker. Maureen lives in Chicago nearby352 Hauser Avenueand is very close to Raven and her twins. She was portrayed byDebbie Allen. Active and vibrant despite her age, Maureen does not like to acknowledge the limitations of her body (describing herself as "fit and fabulous") but does not hesitate to ask for physical help when she needs it. Maureen still enjoys life, is very affectionate with her family, and effortlessly charms whomever she meets. characters.name: Greta Gardunkian
characters.description: Greta GardunkianGeneralFull nameGreta GardunkianGenderFemaleResides inSan Francisco, CaliforniaOccupationMedia StarAppearanceEye colorBrownHair colorBrownRelationshipsFamilyGabby Gardunkian (mother)FriendsNikkiAffiliationsGettin' Down with the GardunkiansGardunkian Media EmpireProductionSeason (s)6Appears inA.I., A.I., Oh… Snap!Portrayed byLilla CrawfordGreta Gardunkianwas a resident of San Francisco, a media star known for the popular reality show,Gettin' Down with the Gardunkians, which chronicles the antics of Greta and the rest of the members of her infamous family.     She is a prominent pillar withinNikki's social circle and the pair share a superficial, tenuous friendship, contingent upon Nikki remaining successful, but not as successful as Greta, herself. She is portrayed byLilla Crawford .

characters.name: Isabella
characters.description: IsabellaGeneralGenderFemaleAge9 (Season 2)Resides inChicagoOccupationStudentSchoolGeorge Washington Carver Community SchoolAppearanceHair colorBrownRelationshipsRomancesLevi Grayson(crush on his side)FriendsTannerLeviNia BaxterTessEnemiesMitch Moseley(former)ProductionSeason (s)2Appears inHead Over WheelsPortrayed byEliza Pryor Isabellawas a character onRaven's Home.She is a young girl with a disability who uses a wheelchair. She helps with a protest to make352 Hauser Avenuebecome wheelchair-accessible. She was portrayed byEliza Pryor. Isabella is smart and confident, and funny as she loves to make jokes to lighten up the mood without letting her disability get in the way. She is strong and courageous as she confrontsMitchfor not making the apartment building wheelchair-accessible. She is sociable and easy to make new friends. She is helpful and caring as seen in the way she wants to helpTannerand Levi when they tell her about their injuries.

Isabella is smart and confident, and funny as she loves to make jokes to lighten up the mood without letting her disability get in the way. She is strong and courageous as she confrontsMitchfor not making the apartment building wheelchair-accessible. She is sociable and easy to make new friends. She is helpful and caring as seen in the way she wants to helpTannerand Levi when they tell her about their injuries.
